description:
Legal testimony. In Judaeo-Arabic. Location: Fustat. Dated: Wednesday, 17 Adar 1536 Seleucid = 26 February 1225 CE. Signed by Eliyyahu the Judge and Pinḥas b. Sheʾerit ha-Kohen. About an auction by criers and brokers in the bazaar of clothing, likely from the property of an orphan. Same cluster: T-S AS 157.434 (PGPID 38900), CUL Or.1080 J64 (PGPID 8866), and T-S NS J299 (PGPID 4311).

Reused on verso for Hebrew writing exercises and accounts (mainly of food items) in Arabic script and Greek/Coptic numerals.
description_he: עדות משפטית; ביהודית-ערבית; פוסטאט; רביעי, 17 לאדר 1536 שטרות = 26 בפברואר 1225 לספירה; על מכירה פומבית בשוק הביגוד; כנראה מרכוש יתום
